items.caption: A warning sign with the word "corrosive" prominently displayed, indicating the presence of corrosive materials. the sign is mounted on a white corrugated metal surface, which is typical for industrial or construction environments. the sign itself is black with white text and features a pictogram of a hand and a chemical symbol, further emphasizing the hazardous nature of the materials. the sign is securely fastened to the metal surface with bolts, ensuring its visibility and effectiveness in conveying the warning.
